name: The Caddy Shack Indoor Golf & Pub
about: The Caddy Shack is an indoor golf and sports bar facility located in Duluth, Minnesota. It features three HD Golf simulators for playing 9 and 18-hole games on world-famous courses, as well as a chipping and driving range for practice. The venue also offers a Laser Shot shooting simulator and a private karaoke suite. A full bar and kitchen are available, and the space can be rented for meetings or private events. Club rentals are offered for those without equipment.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple simulation options including HD Golf and Laser Shot shooting simulator
Club rentals available for those who do not have their own equipment
Full bar and kitchen amenities available on-site
State-of-the-art HD Golf simulators with access to world-famous courses

food_and_drink.notes: Kitchen is open, with a variety of food options and snacks available. Kitchen hours vary by day.
Full bar with local craft and domestic beers available.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but club rentals are available if you cannot.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not allowed as the venue offers its own kitchen and full bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but the facility offers 9 and 18-hole games on its simulators.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and offers games and activities suitable for children.
